step1.title: Let's set up your first project
step1.subtitle: Tell us about the website you want to track

step2.title: What languages does your site target?
step2.subtitle: Select the languages of your content for better analysis

step3.title: How do you want to manage backlinks?
step3.subtitle: Choose the strategy that fits your workflow
step3.autoDesc: We'll scan the web to find existing backlinks pointing to your site
step3.manualDesc: Upload a CSV file or paste URLs of your known backlinks
step3.skipDesc: You can always add backlinks later from your project dashboard

step4.title: Ready to launch!
